reviews.title: Hero Splendor Review – A Reliable Bike for Daily Use
reviews.description: I have been using my Hero Splendor bike for a long time, mainly for daily travel like going to college, office, and local work. My overall experience with this bike has been very good. The biggest advantage of the Splendor is its excellent mileage. Even with regular city riding, it gives very good fuel efficiency, which helps save money on petrol.</br>The bike is smooth to ride and easy to control in traffic. The seat is comfortable, and the suspension works well on rough and uneven roads. I do not feel tired even after long rides. The engine performance is simple but reliable, and it does not create much noise. Maintenance cost is low, and spare parts are easily available everywhere. This bike may not look very stylish or fast, but for daily use, Hero Splendor is a dependable and stress-free choice.

reviews.title: The Timeless Mileage King Meets Modern
reviews.description: The Hero Splendor Plus XTEC is a masterclass in practical commuting, successfully blending its legendary reputation for reliability with modern-day essentials. The driving experience is defined by its light 112 kg kerb weight, which makes it incredibly agile and easy to flick through congested city lanes. Comfort is a highlight for daily office runs, thanks to a well-padded seat and an upright riding posture that reduces back strain, though the suspension can feel a bit stiff over sharp potholes. Performance-wise, the 97.2cc engine is a refined workhorse that remains silent at low speeds, though vibrations become noticeable once you cross the 165 km/h mark. Its greatest strength is undeniably the mileage, consistently delivering 65–70 km/l in real-world conditions. The XTEC upgrade adds a layer of sophistication with a fully digital console, Bluetooth alerts, and a USB charger, which are rare luxuries in this segment. While the build quality is rugged enough 1 for rural roads, some owners have noted minor rusting on chrome parts if not maintained. Hero’s after-sales service remains its biggest competitive advantage, offering the most affordable spare parts and a vast network that ensures a hassle-free ownership experience for years.

reviews.title: Nice
reviews.description: Good bike for ruff roads, it's mailage is too good , I love this my and comfortable to my hight,The Hero Splendor Plus XTEC 2.0 has received largely positive feedback, reinforcing its reputation as India's premier, reliable, and fuel-efficient commuter motorcycle. The blend of classic, durable, and low-maintenance design with modern, updated features that enhance the daily riding experience.

reviews.title: Facing clutch issue regularly
reviews.description: I purchased the bike 2 years ago and use it regularly, but I am facing a clutch issue again and again. I have visited the service centre multiple times, but they haven't found a permanent solution. Every time I go to the service centre, they replace the clutch and clutch wire, and I have to pay for the same. The gear shifting is very hard in this bike. The brakes are not giving me confidence while riding.

reviews.title: Passion xtec best bike for daily uses
reviews.description: Passion XTEC is are best bike for daily use. Average quality is best. Average around 50 to 55 kilometers per liter. Low maintenance costs. Engine 110 cc. Fuel capacity 10 liters. Top speed 90 to 100 kmph. USB port charger for charging mobile phone devices.  LED projector headlights.  Brakes are an integrated braking system (IBS). 4-speed manual gear system.  Overall, bikes are good for daily use, and the design is also good.

reviews.title: Great speed, great throttle response
reviews.description: Speed is very good but the bike goes solo. The throttle response is amazing. Built quality is such that it won't go anywhere in 15 years if the engine oil is changed at the proper time. Disc variant should be chosen for better braking. Now the design and graphics look too cool. This bike is made to carry loads and to live a long life. Safety is better than smaller bikes such as Splender and Hf Deluxe. Consider this.

reviews.title: Rough and tough
reviews.description: I bought this bike 2 years ago, so first of all, I was not interested in buying this bike, but my friend insisted I buy this bike, and guess what after driving this bik,e I feel I invested my money in the right place it's the mileage is almost 70 to 75, and I recommend to all but this bike if your budget 1 lakh and one more thing it's body very heavy as compared to others bike.

reviews.title: Don't let the looks decive you, but fantastic in mileage (70kmpl)but looks like it's dropping now due to issues
reviews.description: Got the bike quick and easy process </br>Pros: Looks better than most of the average commuter's </br>*Brakes are ok</br>*Mileage of 70kmpl fabulous </br>Cons:</br>Having the gear issue from day one</br>Gears keep grinding or decide to just fall to lower gear which almost put me in fatal situations.</br>Service people don't give a shit instead they fought with me and I continuously rant about the problem. Since been quiet about the gearbox issue</br>The engine decides to cut off on low rpm even if the clutch is pressed</br>The ignition switch doesn't work after some months</br>Now feels like due to all the engine issues mileage dropped to 50 now </br>Not the best handling in corners and wobbles crazily above 70kmph</br>Headlight sucks ass. Can't see shit at night times even the high beam is useless</br>And the tank is empty even though it has 2+ liters </br>Now having a starting issue</br>The i3s system doesn't work</br>Chain noises keep coming back even after changing the sprocket send and bush set 2 days before.</br>I love the connection I built with the bike.</br>It's not the fault of the bike it's the fault of the manufacturer. And service people If thinking of buying don't buy.</br>Almost had this love-hate relationship with this bike for 25000kms and 3+ years now

reviews.title: Attractive Bike
reviews.description: The Hero Passion Pro is one of the most popular commuter motorcycles in India, known for its reliability, fuel efficiency, and stylish design. Manufactured by Hero MotoCorp, the Passion Pro has been designed especially for daily commuters who want a balance of performance, comfort, and affordability.</br>One of the biggest strengths of the Hero Passion Pro is its excellent mileage, which makes it an ideal choice for people who travel long distances every day. The bike is equipped with a 110cc engine that provides smooth performance and good pickup for city riding. The engine is refined and reliable, ensuring that riders experience minimal vibrations and consistent performance over time. Because of its fuel-efficient engine, the Passion Pro can deliver an impressive mileage of around 60–70 km per litre, making it economical for everyday use.</br>In terms of design, the Hero Passion Pro has a sporty and modern look that appeals to young riders as well as working professionals. The bike features stylish graphics, a sleek fuel tank, and attractive alloy wheels that give it a premium appearance despite being a commuter motorcycle. The comfortable seat and upright riding position make it suitable for long rides as well as daily office commutes.</br>Another important feature of the Hero Passion Pro is its comfort and handling. The bike is lightweight and easy to control, which makes it perfect for riding in heavy city traffic. The suspension system absorbs bumps and rough roads effectively, providing a smooth riding experience. Additionally, the braking system is responsive and reliable, ensuring rider safety.</br>The Passion Pro also comes with several modern features, such as an i3S (Idle Stop-Start System) technology that helps save fuel by automatically turning off the engine when the bike is idle and restarting it when the clutch is pressed. This feature improves fuel efficiency and makes the bike more environmentally friendly.</br>Overall, the Hero Passion Pro is a practical, stylish, and fuel-efficient motorcycle that meets the needs of everyday riders. With its dependable engine, comfortable ride quality, and affordable maintenance costs, it continues to be one of the most trusted commuter bikes in India. It is an excellent choice for students, office workers, and anyone looking for a reliable two-wheeler for daily transportation.

reviews.title: Very good for millage
reviews.description: Its very good experience to buy motorcycle I have run daily atleast 50km on highway its comfortable and easy to ride on highway but on cross country road some time i felt uncomfortable when bike jump on cross country road. There are should be more comfortable for rural rider who ride on cross country road. Maintenance are very low cost i have never been expanse extra rather then normal engine oil or labor charge. Its very low cost maintenance.

reviews.title: Nice bike
reviews.description: I have been riding this bike for a few months now, and overall, I am very satisfied with my purchase. The delivery process was smooth and on time, and the showroom staff were very supportive throughout the entire process. They clearly explained all the features, warranty details, and service schedule, which gave me confidence as a buyer.</br>The bike's performance is excellent for both city rides and short highway trips. The engine feels refined, and the pickup is smooth even in traffic conditions. The mileage is decent and matches what was promised by the company. The seating position is comfortable, and even after longer rides, I do not feel much strain on my back. The suspension handles small potholes and rough roads quite well, which is very useful for daily commuting.</br>I also got a very good deal with attractive offers at the time of purchase, which made the experience even better. The braking system is responsive, and the overall build quality feels strong and durable. The design looks stylish and gets attention on the road.</br>So far, maintenance has been minimal, and the service support has been helpful whenever I had small queries. I would definitely recommend this bike to anyone looking for a reliable, comfortable, and value-for-money option for daily use. Overall, I am happy with my decision.

reviews.title: Best bike for daily use and great performance for day to day  use
reviews.description: I have been using the Hero Passion Plus and I am very happy with my decision. The buying experience was smooth and the showroom staff were helpful and explained everything clearly. The bike looks simple and stylish, and it is perfect for daily use.</br>The riding experience is very comfortable. The seat is soft and wide, so even long rides do not feel tiring. The engine is smooth and gives good pickup for city rides. It also gives very good mileage, which is great for saving money on fuel</br>Maintenance cost is low and service is easily available. Spare parts are affordable and the bike is easy to handle in traffic.</br>Good mileage, comfortable seat, low maintenance, smooth engine.</br>Overall, Hero Passion Plus is a reliable and budget-friendly bike for daily commuting. I would definitely recommend it to others.

reviews.title: budget king in 100 cc
reviews.description: The bike was nice. But if you ride  70+. The bike is out of control. Brakes were not supported. If you ride in economy or 60 below, then brakes were perfect to use & mileage was decent around 55 if you run 65 +, only if you run economy, then you will get 55+. Mileage. Overall. budget bike in 100 cc.

reviews.title: Smooth Ride, Stylish Look & Great Value – Loving My Hero Glamour!
reviews.description: I’ve been riding my Hero Glamour for quite some time now and overall I’m very satisfied with the experience. The buying process was smooth and the bike immediately impressed me with its stylish design and comfortable seating. For daily commuting, it feels light, easy to handle, and gives good mileage which helps save fuel cost.</br>The engine performance is reliable and smooth even in city traffic, and the suspension handles rough roads decently. Maintenance has been simple so far — regular servicing, chain cleaning, and tyre pressure checks keep it running perfectly.</br>Pros: Comfortable ride, good fuel efficiency, attractive looks, low maintenance.</br>Cons: Could have slightly more pickup on highways.</br>Overall, it’s a practical and dependable bike for everyday use and I’d recommend it to anyone looking for a balanced commuter.

expert_reviews.title: Hero Xtreme 160R Track Review: BikeWale Trackday 2021
expert_reviews.description: Just like every other BikeWale Trackday, the 2021 edition has a theme. For this year, we decided to include motorcycles that impressed us with their performance on the streets. And after having the Hero Xtreme 160R as our long-termer for three months and being blown away by what it had to offer, it was obvious for us to have it for this year’s trackday.

expert_reviews.title: BikeWale TrackDay 2021: An Introduction
expert_reviews.description: Welcome to the 2021 edition of BikeWale TrackDay. The global pandemic made life hard for everyone but it didn’t break our spirits, just like it didn’t break yours. But nevertheless, things are getting better for good and that meant, we could get back riding and testing bikes. And thankfully, we managed to get access to a race track to celebrate some interesting motorcycles.

expert_reviews.title: TVS Apache RTR 160 4V vs Hero Xtreme 160 R: Comparison Test Review
expert_reviews.description: How does the 2021 TVS Apache RTR 160 4V fare against one of our favourite 160cc motorcycles, the Hero Xtreme 160 R? We rode both motorcycles in the city and out on the highway to rate them on our tried and tested pointing system to find out the answers.

expert_reviews.title: Hero Xtreme 160R Long Term Review 2: City Riding
expert_reviews.description: The Hero Xtreme 160R has become a major part of my daily routine since December last year. Until now, the motorcycle has profoundly awed me in all respects and riding conditions.

expert_reviews.title: Hero Xtreme 160R Long Term Review: Introduction
expert_reviews.description: During our long stint with the Xtreme 160R, we will try to answer all the questions a prospective buyer of the bike would want to know.

reviews.title: Just okay
reviews.description: I'm writing this review after 5 years of use. Not worth spending. First, I would like to focus on the pros: Good front and back design, front ABS is good, the LED lights are good, ride comfort is okay, sturdy design, and acceleration is quite okay. </br>Cons: chain and sprocket is very poor had to change within 2 years of usage(despite of maintaining it and lubricating regularly), back disc brakes are useless( skids after applying), old model doesn't have brightness control on speedometer (makes night riding difficult), front suspension sealing isn't good, efficiency dropped drastically, engine light comes on very frequently (had to take to garage regularly).</br>Not worth spending lakhs on this bike.

reviews.title: Hero Xtreme 160R Single Disc - OBD 2B
reviews.description: I bought my bike just before 3 months ago, and now I'm facing many technical problems, especially with the display and all indicator gadgets. There are no proper sensors in the indicator gadgets. As they guaranteed that the bike would not face any issues for 2 years, but within 3 months, everything collapsed, and they are not providing proper service for what we asked for.

reviews.title: Most catchy and affordable 160cc Beast.
reviews.description: Looks are good, it will attract both a family man and a young man. </br>Getting Good mileage.</br>Maintenance Cost is low.</br>Reliable.</br>The engine is very smooth.</br>Quality is quite good according to price.</br>And one of the most likable parts is that its break is too good.</br>Go for it, just buy that bike, you will love the ride on it.

reviews.title: Hero Xtreme 160R Single Disc - OBD 2B
reviews.description: This bike is very comfortable for long rides and also for city riding with fuel efficiency, and this bike is fit for the young generation and the old generation too. This bike comes with a good range, and it is suitable for a middle-class family. I am suggesting and rating this bike 5 stars in everything. And very cost-efficient.

reviews.title: Value for money in the segment of 160R 2V
reviews.description: Good experience riding this bike...It is value for money in the 160r 2v segment. The bike looks are also sharp and feels like a naked sport bike...its single seat variant is also comfortable for a pillion. Its initial and mid-range is good. Also, Feels NO vibration on top end (110km/h). Some cons are also there like. Rear disc brake and gear missing problems. One issue which I feel may not everyone feel is the exhaust sound, the exhaust sounds like you were riding a 125cc bike. The exhaust sound must be loud and heavy.

expert_reviews.title: Hero Xtreme 200S First Ride Review
expert_reviews.description: This is the fully faired version of the Xtreme 200R. It is priced at under a lakh ex showroom in Delhi, and it makes no pretence of being an out and out sports bike. It is still for the Aam aadmi; still for the commuter junta; and still for those who will only own one motorcycle. But, Hero says the extra pizzazz the 200S brings in, is something even commuter centric consumers want.

reviews.description: If you need power dont expect mileage.</br>If you buying 200cc so dont read the review for mileage </br>But still it gives you decent mileage of 35-40 </br>Comfort is good for both pillion and rider,</br>Only the service you expect is not good try to give to hero expert u will get good performance too....</br>One word is this bike is beast not compare to Karizma R </br>But it is good too.

reviews.title: Hero Xtreme 200S
reviews.description: The bike is very sporty, so it is for the younger generation. I am 59, so not very comfortable for day-to-day use.</br>I have used, on average, just 750 kms in a year. So recommend it for younger people. The mileage is excellent for a 200 cc bike, and the pickup and power also match the ride quality.

reviews.title: fuel pump was not working and The color of the rim has faded
reviews.description: Hero Xtreme 200S</br>After 1 year of purchase, the fuel pump was not working. Replaced it with the new one provided by Hero Motocop.</br>now again facing the problem of the bike not starting when kept for a long time in open sunlight also when the bike is running for a long ride then the petrol tank gets heated and when we kept in a shadow place for 10–15 minutes the bike starts. The worst bike ever from Hero.</br>The color of the rim has faded within 6 months. Additionally, the feedback received from the showroom has not been positive, and there is no guarantee provided for any spare parts if they are not functioning properly. I’ve used a total of 4 Hero bikes and 2 Honda bikes, but I’ve never encountered a bike this problematic. I would advise against don't buying this bike, as it is a waste of money. After purchasing the bike, I have spent 35,000 to 40,000 rupees on repairs and maintenance over the past 1.5 years.

reviews.title: Fuel Pump Getting heated.
reviews.description: Hero Xtreme 200S</br>within 6 months of purchase, the fuel pump was not working. Replaced it with the new one provided by Hero Motocop.</br>now again facing the problem of the bike not starting when kept for a long time in open sunlight also when the bike is running for a long ride then the petrol tank gets heated</br>and when we kept in a shadow place for 10–15 minutes the bike starts. the worst bike ever from Hero.

reviews.title: Don't waste your money
reviews.description: The engine is very bad, and the sound quality is bad, need to make it every week. uncomfortable miles are low .. battery, chains pocket, timing chain are not last.

reviews.title: Average performance
reviews.description: Bike is not so good as our expectation. The fuel pump stopped working after one year from purchase. The quality of after sale service is very poor as they don't have trained mechanic staff to rectify the issue/trouble in bike. I wasted my two months to resolve a single issue in my bike. Overall my rating for this bike is  average.

values: Telescopic (37 mm Dia) with Double DU Bush (190 mm Stroke)

expert_reviews.title: Rynox Magnapod Tank and Tail Bag: Tested!
expert_reviews.description: Motorcycle luggage can change the way you ride for good. I never realised its importance until the Rynox Magnapod tank/tail bag came in for testing. Here is our detailed review.

expert_reviews.title: Hero Xpulse 200 BS6 Long Term Report: Touring
expert_reviews.description: I have always had my eyes on Vikrant’s Xpulse 200 long termer. And there's a reason; I had been desperately waiting to get my hands on the rally suspension for my own Xpulse 200 and since the day Vikrant installed this after-market kit on his Xpulse, I just couldn't help but find ways to borrow it from him.

expert_reviews.title: Hero Xpulse 200 BS6 Long Term Review: Rally Kit Stage One
expert_reviews.description: In the previous report, we introduced you to the extremely well thought-out rally kit from Hero for the Xpulse 200. Now, we have installed the first few bits of that kit to our Xpulse 200.

expert_reviews.title: Gulf Oil Powertrac 4T Synthetic engine oil review for Hero Xpulse 200: Tested
expert_reviews.description: It’s been a thousand kilometres since we started running the Hero Xpulse 200 with the Gulf Oil Powertrac 4T Synthetic engine oil. And the differences compared to the stock oil are clear as day.

expert_reviews.title: Hero Xpulse 200 Rally Kit Product Review: Introduction
expert_reviews.description: We have both the Xpulse and the rally kit in long term test and over the next few months, we will tell you what difference the kit makes to the riding experience of the Xpulse.

reviews.title: Go for it as soon as possible don't waste on himalayan like bike.
reviews.description: Looks like it is unbeatable and it is with me at on minimum servicing cost, I loved this bike with my soul and the very very unexpected adventure and memory I created with it, I will always suggest going for the bike at any cost not waste your valuable time and even money in those bikes which will always make you unhappy with every condition.

reviews.title: The Perfect Affordable Adventure Bike for Off-Road Enthusiasts.
reviews.description: The buying process was smooth with helpful dealership staff. Pricing is reasonable, especially for adventure enthusiasts. It offers a great off-road experience, thanks to its lightweight and comfortable riding position. It's perfect for city commutes and weekend trail rides. Maintenance is affordable, with Hero's wide service network making it convenient.

reviews.title: Good bike
reviews.description: Good bike for long riding. Good for city rides, comfort riding and good mileage on highways.</br>Ground clearance is very good. Top-rated service from customer care. Low-cost maintenance and spare parts cost is very low compared to other superbikes.</br>Good bikes for riding and great comfort for long riding. low-budget vehicle.
reviews.tips: Change oil after 3000km. Do chain lubes.

reviews.title: Wy honest riview about xpulse 200
reviews.description: The XPulse 200 is a remarkable adventure motorcycle that delivers an exceptional riding experience. Its robust design, coupled with reliable performance, makes it a top choice for adventure enthusiasts. With its powerful engine, agile handling, and comfortable ergonomics, the XPulse 200 is perfect for both on-road and off-road adventures. Additionally, its advanced features like long-travel suspension, dual-purpose tires, and LED lighting ensure a safe and enjoyable ride in any terrain or weather condition. Overall, the XPulse 200 truly excels in providing an exhilarating and thrilling adventure biking experience.

reviews.title: Hero Xpulse 200
reviews.description: Used this Bike for over a year, and faced only 2 issues which were that the seat was a little uncomfortable for the long ride and didn't have a center Stand as the side stand was not up to the mark. Need the Center Stand if we bought it separately but does not fit properly. Other than that bike was superb to ride.
reviews.tips: If Plan to Alter anything  just plan to alter the Seat to Feel the ride as more comfortable

reviews.title: Xpulse 200 quick review
reviews.description: It is a wonderful bike. Great riding posture. Great comfort. No vibration. Decent looking, with great performance. It has a top speed of 125kmph. Fuel efficiency is up to 40kmpl. Less service cost and less maintenance.  Affordable offroader in this range. The bike is strongly built. The headlamp range could have been better.

expert_reviews.title: 2019 Hero Maestro Edge 125 First Ride Review
expert_reviews.description: The Maestro Edge 125 is Hero MotoCorp’s attempt to capture the growing 125cc scooter segment. Yes, the Destini 125 has already been in the market since the last few months, but this one is a bit more premium and is targeted at Indians who are style conscious and want something premium. Hero claims that a lot of focus has gone into making the Maestro Edge 125 an easy going, comfortable and performance scooter. We spent a few hours with it in the grueling New Delhi traffic to uncover some of its traits.

reviews.title: Complete Review after running 3 Years
reviews.description: I bought this scooter in 2022 for my wife. And we ran it around 18000 Kms till now. Maestro Edge's looking is very good, seat is comfortable and the storage is also efficient. In the start scooter was giving good performance but after one year engine sound drastically changed. I found something rubbing sound from the engine and after many services even engine work is done from the company sound is lowered but not gone. Also, pickup is also down now. Mileage wise in city it is giving around 35-40. Hero service is good but costly in comparison to local service shops. Also, I didn't understand what type of engine oil they use. They charge around 470 for an engine oil and you can buy best quality and branded oils in much cheaper price. I think that's the main reason why their services are very costly. Regarding this scooter, it is a decent option but not much reliable if you are looking for high performance. Also, not giving that much mileage as company promise. I have talked their service person many times about this but no resolution.

reviews.title: One of worst scooty ever I seen
reviews.description: It is a big elephant to keep at home. I think all body parts are made in the local plastic factory. Every time, one of the problems will arise. There is nothing good to say in this model. How Hero Company made this model & it was withdrawn within 6 months of launching. I have purchased for 1.02 lakh. When I plan to exchange in the showroom, is price is now 25000. The Hero company has been making a fool of customers.

reviews.title: Superb quality scooter
reviews.description: Very good decision, I'm very happy with my purchase, it's unbelievable comfort and pleasure giving scooter, one of the best manufactured by Hero company, best design, gorgeous look, very good mileage, and great quality, super strong quality of engine to feel strong to drive, heavy duty body structure is also amazing.

reviews.title: "Power-Packed Ride with this scooty but a Few Bumps Along the Way!"
reviews.description: I purchased this scooter for myself to drive into the city, what I like is the power of the scooter I mean this is the just best scooter in the 125cc segment but the main thing is the suspension is not so smooth also Hero doesn't work hard on mechanics every time in 6 months I need to visit a garage to check it out, and I am maintaining this scooter very well all servicing is also done on time but still sometimes scooter got off in the middle of the road which makes me kind of frustrate rest is okay, Build quality is not strong but looks nice, Overall till now fit finish is okay, Drive experience is mind blowing only a few negative I mentioned above.

reviews.title: Awesome
reviews.description: It's a good scooter. I've got a top variant model. Happily riding. If you're thinking about a scooter then you can choose it. Awesome design & looks comfortable riding. A well-wheeler from Hero the Indian brand, Good Looks quality & advanced features are some of the attractive parts.

reviews.title: Very bad experience of maestro edge
reviews.description: Very big problem for me start and this problem was not solved by the service centre, I spent more than 10000/- and changed the lock set from Jalaram Service Centre Adajan Surat and the very bad service did not solve the problem, i suggest not purchasing maestro edge this is wastage of money and also poor service knowledge to hero employee mechanic, particularly Jalaram Service centre Adajan Surat

faqs.answer: The 2026 on-road price of Hero Pleasure Plus in Delhi is Rs. 82,784. This Hero Pleasure Plus price includes the ex-showroom price, RTO and insurance charges.

faqs.question: What is the actual mileage of Hero Pleasure Plus?
faqs.answer: According to the user reported data, Hero Pleasure Plus gives an average mileage of 50 kmpl.

faqs.question: Which is better Hero Pleasure Plus or TVS Zest 110?
faqs.answer: Hero Pleasure Plus is priced at Rs. 68,054, has a 110.9 cc engine, gives a mileage of 50 kmpl and weighs 104 kg, whereas, the price of TVS Zest 110 is Rs. 69,941 with a 109.7 cc engine, giving a mileage of 45 kmpl and weighing 103 kg.

expert_reviews.title: 2019 Hero Pleasure Plus First Ride Review
expert_reviews.description: After almost 14 years of existence, Hero MotoCorp decided to give a major facelift to the Pleasure. It’s now called the Pleasure Plus and gets some big aesthetic and mechanical updates because ‘Why should boys have all the fun?’

reviews.title: Burst service and manufacturing quality
reviews.description: Bike service bahut bekar h </br>Warranty hone ke bad bhi warranty claim nhi karte h</br>Inke service karne wale kuch nhi jante andha dhun kaam karte jo cheeze kharab nhi hoti use bhi kharab bata dete h. Isme Jo log kaam karte wo help nhi karte h Ise nhi kharide me bilkul recommend nhi karunga.

reviews.title: From zero to zoom my scooter buying journey
reviews.description: Used Bikewale platform for researching about scooters, very nice experience as every information is in clicks, knowing about the scooter, comparing other scooters with what I selected, emi calculator, etc, everything on one platform, very good experience overall, I'll prefer this platform for my next purchase.

reviews.title: Best scooter
reviews.description: Best scooter I have ever seen in my entire life, very good mileage, and cost maintenance. I recommend everyone to go for this.

reviews.title: Good for all type of people.
reviews.description: Good bike for the city and village roads.</br>Instant pickup and good mileage and good performance.</br>When I ride other bikes it's more comfort and good to see bike design in a neat manner.</br>Nice design and attractive model.</br>At service centers it's lazy people are working but good at work.</br>For any repairs they will solve and clear.

reviews.title: Perfect companion for daily needs
reviews.description: Hero pleasure is a nice light vehicle even my wife drives with comfort and easily in narrow roads with full of traffic</br>And my daughter is also learning quickly with such a user-friendly vehicle </br>Thank you hero,Its really an Hero </br>And now it has became an important part of our life</br>Hero is always hero

reviews.title: my best scooter
reviews.description: My best scooter is Hero Pleasure. It has a very strong and stylish look, and the blue color is very nice. The performance is very good, and it looks great. The scooter has alloy wheels, the best headlight, and good stability. I am so happy to have bought this scooter. My best scooter is Hero Pleasure. It is very strong and stylish, the blue color is very nice, and the performance is excellent. It has the best alloy wheels, headlight, and stability. I am very happy to buy this scooter.

faqs.answer: The 2026 on-road price of Hero Destini 125 in Delhi is Rs. 90,196. This Hero Destini 125 price includes the ex-showroom price, RTO and insurance charges.

faqs.question: What is the actual mileage of Hero Destini 125?
faqs.answer: According to the user reported data, Hero Destini 125 gives an average mileage of 52 kmpl.

faqs.question: Which is better Hero Destini 125 or Hero Destini Prime?
faqs.answer: Hero Destini 125 is priced at Rs. 79,652, has a 124.6 cc engine, gives a mileage of 52 kmpl and weighs 115 kg, whereas, the price of Hero Destini Prime is Rs. 75,586 with a 124.6 cc engine, giving a mileage of 49 kmpl and weighing 115 kg.

faqs.question: What are the colour options of Hero Destini 125?

faqs.question: What are the key specifications of Hero Destini 125?

expert_reviews.title: Hero Destini 125: Road Test Review
expert_reviews.description: The Hero Destini 125 is a smooth, efficient, and comfortable 125cc scooter that only lacks underseat storage space.

expert_reviews.title: New Hero Destini 125: First Ride Review
expert_reviews.description: Close to 46 per cent of the scooters that are sold in India are 125cc ones. And within this, there are some big players like the Suzuki Access 125, TVS Jupiter 125 and the Honda Activa 125.

reviews.title: Don't buy disc brake models
reviews.description: Over all Good scooter. But there is some noise in the disc brake models from the disc brake. And hero service centre can't rectify the problem. The over scooter is good. Ride comfort is also Good. Very good sitting position. The long run is also Good. Mileage is also decent. I3S technology works properly. Very helpful in traffic.

reviews.title: Good option in market with other brands
reviews.description: I purchase destiny 125 on 12 may 2025 after 8 months my experience is overall good. There is comfort,ride quality, good mileage. 2nd service done 4500kms service centre is not upto mark. so many sales over there but do not have big service centre they kept 2 days for 1st service only for oil change inspection,, they listen the complaint but do not resolve the issues.  my first issue was front guard was fix properly i raise issues but fix by service centre,2nd rear break is not up to the mark i raise but not fix. Accelerate is was hard little not fix. After 4000kms accelerate wire broke off I got fix outside in the garage near me need to improve the service centre.

reviews.title: Much better than activa jupiter
reviews.description: Fully comfortable Long drive, stability, amazing look, everything is the best. Affordable price, excellent fuel efficiency with its i3s system a comfortable ride thanks to a long, cushioned seat and soft suspension, a solid metal body for durability, and practical features like a USB charger, boot light, and -cancel indicators.

reviews.title: Very nice scooter
reviews.description: I’ve been riding the Hero Destini 125 for a while now, and I must say it’s one of the best scooters in its segment. The 125cc engine delivers smooth and reliable performance, making both city rides and longer commutes very comfortable. The scooter feels stable on the road, and the pickup is impressive for daily use.</br>One of the highlights is its i3S technology (idle stop-start system), which really helps in saving fuel, especially in city traffic. The mileage is quite good for a 125cc scooter, and maintenance costs are low compared to competitors.</br>Comfort-wise, the wide seat and suspension setup ensure a smooth ride even on rough roads. The design is stylish and premium, with a nice balance of elegance and sportiness. Features like external fuel filling, USB charging port, and good under-seat storage make it very practical for everyday use.</br>Overall, the Hero Destini 125 is a value-for-money scooter that combines performance, comfort, and efficiency. Perfect for anyone looking for a reliable and stylish daily commuter.

reviews.title: Over hyped
reviews.description: I have been using this for the last two years and it seems that it is not worth it with this much money the battery gets down weekly and lot of accessories get damaged and the petrol consumption is the worst. I feel like should have gone for 350cc.</br>Even though the ride is smooth but it is but heavy than other in the same segment.</br>Before you purchase, you must think about the mileage and additional expenses on the scooter.

reviews.title: Hero Destini 125 VX - OBD 2B
reviews.description: This scooter is very easy to drive and has very good mileage. Companies always quote higher mileage figures for bikes or scooters, but the company has kept its mileage at 50 kmpl and it gives a mileage of up to 55 kmpl. In some cases, it touches 60v if you are driving on the highway. All seven things are correct in it, only one thing seemed useless to me, which is its unnecessary sound that its parts produce.

expert_reviews.title: Hero Duet First Ride Review
expert_reviews.description: The Hero Duet is India’s largest two-wheeler maker’s attempt at taking its scooter sales to the next level. And like the Maestro Edge, the Duet too has shrugged off Honda's technology and is a completely home grown Hero MotoCorp offering. So, it was back to the drawing board and out came a completely new platform and powertrain. Positioned between the masculine Maestro and the effeminate Pleasure, the Hero Duet is a brand new unisex family scooter, charged with the responsibility of boosting Hero' sales in the burgeoning scooter segment.

reviews.title: “Poor Build, Zero Reliability”
reviews.description: Very poor-quality scooter. Ever since I bought it, I’ve been constantly परेशान—running between the showroom and the garage again and again. When the engine itself has major issues, how can anyone trust this vehicle?</br>It keeps breaking down over small things. The sensors are useless, like toys, and the comfort level is zero. Sometimes the filter gets damaged repeatedly, sometimes there is no spark at all.</br>Even the tyres wore out within just 3 years, despite the scooter being used only in city conditions.</br>Overall, this scooter is completely unreliable. I would not recommend it to anyone

reviews.title: “Hero Duet – More Than Just a Scooty?”
reviews.description: The **Hero Duet** is a dependable scooter for city commuting, with a solid metal body, spacious under-seat storage, and comfortable ride quality. Though its design is more practical than flashy, it handles traffic well, especially with good torque at low speeds. I’m getting around **33 km/l** in real-world mixed usage — lower than the ideal figures, but reasonable given stop-and-go traffic, road conditions, and riding style. Service costs are modest if you stick to the schedule, and Hero’s service network and parts availability are decent. Overall, if you value comfort, ease of maintenance, and durability more than outright speed, the Duet delivers a good balance.

reviews.title: Hero Duet
reviews.description: I have been using duet for now 9 years and after barely visiting service centre 3 times ( only to topup enginne oil and an air filter change ),  the only concerning thing is the brakes it only work properly under 50 km/hr and a little bit of power drop due to CVT rubberband effect same with my destiny 125 because they're same.

reviews.title: Worst scooter with no mileage
reviews.description: Worst scooter with no mileage, worst performance. Waste of money. Nobody should buy it; it's a waste of money. After riding it for 9 years and 14000 kms, I can assure you it's even worse than a Vespa in mileage. We bought it to replace our old Activa, but after its worst performance, we can proudly say that the 2006 model Activa is still performing 10 times better than this, even after riding for 76000 kms.

reviews.title: I'm a duet user from 2016 it is good very good and heavy duty vehicle for our home purpose
reviews.description: Overall, very nice experience </br>Good vehicle to purchase for home purposes </br>Heavy-duty vehicle </br>Smooth driving </br>Less Maintenance </br>For Rough use is good </br>Overall good vehicle to buy</br>Also, get the Resale value </br>Road presence is good due to the heavy weight </br>Always give a comfortable ride</br>Spacious Space under the seat </br>Off-road driving is a good experience </br>Suspension is good

reviews.title: Never buy any scooter without knowing my 7 years riding experience
reviews.description: My overall experience is 7 years riding this scooter the ride quality is too poor for village areas as roads are not maintained well so and the too much use of plastic is irritating, once it fall somewhere the noise coming from scooter parts is too annoying , you cannot replace it's parts as may of the parts are interconnected with another so it takes too much cost to replace, so I prefer not to buy scooter again because tyres are small so every small hole of the road is felt and body vibrates and these small wheels even slips too much on the road in rain so please never buy scooter again.

reviews.title: Worst EV I’ve Ever Owned – Cheap Build, Useless Service, Total Waste of Money
reviews.description: Owned this vehicle for more than 4 years and used over 50000 km. Build quality is the worst — cheap plastic parts everywhere. Never seen such poor quality even among other electric vehicles. Service network and after-sales support are terrible.  Never buy any EV from Hero Electric. Service centers are shut down and no support or trust remains for Hero EVs.

reviews.title: Worst decision ever
reviews.description: We purchased this a year ago. The first battery failed within the first year, and no replacement was provided. After a year, the second battery also stopped working. We've lost hope, especially since the service centre has shut down. We have lost hope and trust in electric vehicles. I am not sure why these fake companies would do this to innocent people.

reviews.title: Good Bike

Hero Electric is good brand name for quality and service.Its good vehicle is this price range.I recommend to purchase this even for senior citizen, it will be a good choice and also eco friendly for the environment.

reviews.title: Hero Electric Optima: Your Quiet, Eco-Friendly City Companion
reviews.description: Hero Electric Optima is highly recommended if your daily ride is restricted to short-to-medium city commutes where a high top speed isn't a necessity. It’s an excellent choice for a second family vehicle, running errands, or for students.</br>​It is a sensible, reliable, and economical choice that serves as a perfect entry point into the world of electric two-wheelers.

reviews.title: I have parchase hero electric scooter 5 year ago and good battery parfome till time no fault charger and moter and battery
reviews.description: Good battery performance and no problems in the last 5 years. I purchased a Hero electric scooter 5 years ago. It has good performance and battery backup, and I haven't faced any issues with charging or the charger. It has given good performance over time; I love my electric scooter. Now, the battery is a little down after 5 years of use. I have purchased another one.

reviews.description: Looks good for style.. bike smooth handle, flexible driving, mileage more than petrol bike..seat comfortable for senior citizen people.... etc. Thanks. I need a bike with 50000 very good performance. Bike handling is very smooth & exactly guaranteed for purchase.

reviews.title: Hero Electric Flash

reviews.title: My experience
reviews.description: The e-scooter is decent for short commutes but lacks power for uphill climbs. Its portability and ease of use are convenient, but battery life could be better. Overall, it's a satisfactory option for casual riders.</br>smooth ride on flat surfaces, making it ideal for urban environments. Need more improvement.
reviews.tips: Avoid overcharging and try to maintain average speed.

reviews.title: Hero atria
reviews.description: Very stylish, smooth run, load capacity is standard, the headlight is very bright,  but body durability needs to be modified, the problem facing about a meter, body cracked tire is not long-lasting, seat plastic is also broken, suddenly accelerometer not working service center is not non cooperate these are problem facing.

reviews.title: Dealer supplies used battery and manufacturer supports it
reviews.description: Bike design is good. Features are good. Comfort speed riding experience is also nice. The one major drawback is the bike is wholly customized by dealers. Manufacturer gives freedom to dealers to bill the bike with their own choice of spares. This gives room for cheating customer. Just two weeks back I bought the vehicle and it was home delivered with an used battery. I don't know what is the current backup of it. The dealer gives promise to take care the bike for 3 years and installs a used battery which may run the bike for 3 years but not at the rated capacity. So please beware of battery condition while buying.

reviews.title: Review of atria
reviews.description: Hero atria is a superb scooter..... Although it has a maximum speed of 27 km/h, it is most capable in terms of comfort in that range. I have been using this scooter for daily work like dropping my sister at school, my intermediate college, exchange of gas cylinders, leisure rides and many more. You can trust it.

reviews.title: Worst service centre or customer care
reviews.description: The vehicle looks good and driving both customer service is too bad. I have given my vehicle for some fault it's in the warranty not rectified as of today completed 40 days</br>Customer care numbers are never answered</br>Daily service center gives the same reasons or replies and also they tell the company not responding to them also.

reviews.title: Don't not buy any  electric scooter it is  a juggad
reviews.description: Very poor service and don't have good headlight ion very first day its converter was destroyed and in the service the mechanic is very unprofessional they broke my side panel and they are having an attitude toward their costumers very unsatisfied I am thinking of selling it and buy petrol scooty instead like activa.

reviews.title: Overall Bad experience
reviews.description: 1 .Buying experience: This was not available in Fatehgarh Sahib, Punjab. So bought from Zirakpur. They deliver with only single battery and said they will give second battery later. So after 2 months after too many follow-ups, second battery were available. But they said you need to come to our site. I went there after 50 K.M drive then they install second battery but when I return then on the way 1 battery drain and battery switch button did not work. Then again they were helpless.</br>2. Ridding Experience: Average: Though it is commercial model but if you try to carry 50 KG weight, you fill feel scooty will break down from center. Battery indication will never help you to decide that how much it can run more.</br>3. Performance: Plastic body is worst. Locks break in 1st month. Difficult to turn from small space. Can't run more that 45 km/hour.</br>4. Servicing and Maintenance: Worst part of review. Workshop men never help you if you stuck in middle of you route. You will feel helpless. You need to toe your bike at service center and then service mens will not co-operate with you. They will demand 2-3 days minimum.  Body parts are not wasily available. I waited 2 months for headlight bulbs.</br>5. Pros: It saves your fuel only if battery last 5 years.</br>Cons: Low quality material used, Bad service experience, No battery indication, No road side assistance.

reviews.title: Discouraged
reviews.description: I bought an hero electric nyx cx er model scooty ,eight months ago and I am extremely dissatisfied. Not only is the battery malfunctioning, but the tire has also developed a dangerous bubble. These issues, along with the previously mentioned wobbling, have made the ride uncomfortable and risky. To make matters worse, the customer service has been unresponsive and unhelpful. I strongly discourage anyone from purchasing this product due to its unacceptable quality and lack of support.

reviews.title: Bad experience with hero electric
reviews.description: Bought hero electric nyx single battery model in oct 2021. Using for daily commute. It has a few faults which am listing down :</br>1. Battery connector plug is very tight and I cannot disconnect the battery and take it outside the scooter for recharging.</br>2. No suspension at all. Zero cushioning effect while going on bad roads. The scooter shakes and jars you in every pothole on the roads.</br>3. The battery charger gets very hot while charging.</br>4. The support stand kept in the rear for keeping bags, is tilted from the time of purchase onwards. Poor quality control.</br>5. The battery charger plug gets stuck in the battery and also in the connector kept outside the scooter in the front. The charger plug will not come out. After much pulling it may come out. Last time it got stuck and till now I cannot remove it. So I have kept the charger connected to the battery and under the seat, permanently now.</br>6. The scooter goes off when braking and especially while going thru bad roads with potholes. It may start automatically after some time and if am not careful the scooter jumps.</br>7. Finally yesterday the scooter stopped after I applied brakes and did not start again. Now it is not running only even though the battery is fully charged and the horns, lights and indicator panel are all working.</br>Am going to give it to the workshop tomorrow.</br>My advice to anyone who is thinking of buying hero electric scooters : do not buy. Waste of money.
reviews.tips: Give full service every fourth month.

reviews.title: Good for daily uses...
reviews.description: The riding experience is very smooth... No headache of fuel... Now life is simple with the battery scooter... Buying cost is so reasonable... Look is so perfect...  Heart's touching... Always services... On-time Services are very good... No maintenance scooter...This is a lightweight scooter For all and for the future.
reviews.tips: Always charge your scooter after half a battery... It will increase the life of the battery...

reviews.title: Hero electric nyx review
reviews.description: Smooth running on bad road also, engine power is superb</br>Good for locality used , if you go on long routine check battery charging and carry your charger.</br>Nice and modern looking smooth and dashing look as like bike looks.</br>Low maintenance charges compare to petrol scooter/motor cycle</br>Overall good in short distance.
reviews.tips:
Always check out battery condition
and keep charge.

reviews.title: Hero Electric NYX Review
reviews.description: Worst build body meter reading not perfect and battery meter also not perfect (battery meter shows full but you if run 5 km it's battery will full dry )</br>never expected form hero motors, local electrical bike are good then hero service people also not responding I will suggest you everyone please take review when you don't go with the brand name.
